logs.command: python -c "import os; [open(p,'w',encoding='utf-8').write(open(p,encoding='utf-8').read().replace('AI助手（控制平面入口）','AI对话（控制平面入口）')) for r,d,fs in os.walk('frontend') for f in fs if f.endswith(('.ts','.tsx','.js','.jsx','.vue')) for p in [os.path.join(r,f)]]"

python -c "import os; exit(1) if any('AI助手（控制平面入口）' in open(p,encoding='utf-8').read() for r,d,fs in os.walk('frontend') for f in fs if f.endswith(('.ts','.tsx','.js','.jsx','.vue')) for p in [os.path.join(r,f)]) else exit(0)"
